title: Day 4 — Tool calling
summary: Function calling loop · SQLite truth · FlightAI demo.

sections.heading: Today's goal
sections.remember: Model **requests tools** — your Python runs them — results go back until the model answers the user.
points: Lab: `week2/day4.ipynb` · **source of truth** = database/API, not LLM weights.

sections.heading: Tool schema
sections.remember: Pass `tools=[{"type": "function", "function": {name, description, parameters}}]` — **JSON Schema** for arguments.
points: Good descriptions help the model pick the right tool.

sections.heading: Tool loop
sections.remember: When `finish_reason == "tool_calls"` → run functions → append assistant message + **`role: tool`** messages → call API again.
sections.code:
while response.choices[0].finish_reason == "tool_calls":
    message = response.choices[0].message
    messages.append(message)
    messages.extend(handle_tool_calls(message))
    response = openai.chat.completions.create(..., tools=tools)

sections.heading: SQLite example
sections.remember: Ticket **prices** live in SQLite — tool queries DB; model explains the numeric result.
points: Cap max loop iterations · handle bad `json.loads` on arguments.

sections.heading: Gradio + tools
points: Exercise: add tool to **set** ticket price.

cheatSheet: Truth from DB/API, not the model
